case.title: BRADFORD v. COMMISSIONER OF INTERNAL REVENUE

opinion.h: BRADFORD v. COMMISSIONER OF INTERNAL REVENUE , 382 U.S. 868 (1965)
Alice E. BRADFORD, petitioner, v. COMMISSIONER OF INTERNAL REVENUE. No. 340, Misc.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Court of Appeals for the Second Circuit.
Denied.[ Bradford v. Commissioner of Internal Revenue 382 U.S. 686 (1965) ]
